reasoning: 8x zoom reveals generally clean pixel boundaries with no sub-pixel bleed or AA smearing. Solid background areas are noise-free. Palette is appropriately limited (orange, white, teal, gray, near-black). However, the radial petal/flame segments around the body show slight width inconsistency — some segments read as 2px-wide outlines while adjacent ones appear 1px, a common AI-gen rounding artifact. The teal eye-dots are symmetric and clean. The orange petal shading uses 3 tones but transitions between them are slightly gradient-like rather than hard-edge pixel steps, suggesting possible AI upscaling or generation. The gray base shadow is clean. Semantic coherence is high — the bomb-bug design reads correctly. No melting details, no color bleed, no pattern tiling artifacts. Overall the sprite is mostly clean pixel art but the outline inconsistency in the petal ring and mild gradient tone transitions prevent a full pass.
